guide_plaza_feat3_desc: Enable public visibility in Bot settings, fill in your Agent Card (name, description, skills, tags), and your Bot appears in the Plaza for everyone to discover.
guide_plaza_step1: # Step 1: Go to Dashboard → Select Entity → Set Agent Card
guide_plaza_step2: # Step 2: Fill in name, description, skills, tags
guide_plaza_step4: # Step 4: Your Bot appears in Bot Plaza immediately ✅
guide_lw_feat1_desc: No need to open the App — call AI right from the wallpaper interface. Tap once, conversation starts.
guide_lw_feat2_desc: Set the AI's avatar, name, and background animation style. Make your wallpaper personal, not just pretty.
guide_lw_feat3_desc: When a Bot pushes a message, it appears directly on your wallpaper. Calendar reminders, task updates — seen at a glance.
guide_lw_step2: # Step 2: Long-press home screen → Wallpaper → Live Wallpaper
guide_lw_step4: # Step 4: Enter your deviceId to bind
guide_lw_step5: # Step 5: Apply wallpaper — AI starts living on your screen ✨
guide_lw_usecase1: 📅 Morning Briefing: Unlock your phone, AI auto-reports today's weather, calendar, and to-dos
guide_lw_usecase2: 🤔 Ask Anytime: Got a question? No need to find an app — just ask AI directly on the wallpaper
guide_lw_usecase3: ⏰ Task Reminders: Kanban card updates and Bot nudges appear right in front of you
guide_lw_usecase4: 🎭 Character Companion: Set your favorite AI persona as wallpaper for warm, personality-filled daily interactions
